response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Highly accurate match with the reference lyrics for 'Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous' and 'only my railgun', including the promotional speech segment. 2. JSON Usage: Fully leveraged for precise lyric spelling and translation, while manually transcribing the narrator's promotional spoken dialogue at 02:54-03:28. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed very strictly to the rapid beats of both songs and the spoken announcement segment, with zero subtitles during silent visual gaps or instrumental breaks.

subtitles.original: 雨が上がれば愛もその横顔も誰かのものになるのでしょう
subtitles.english: When the rain clears, love and that side profile will belong to someone else, won't they?

subtitles.original: 嘘っぱちのファンデーションも全部今夜のためよ
subtitles.english: All this phony foundation is for tonight

subtitles.original: なのに一体全体如何して何故？ 如何して何故？ 何故何故怒ってんの？
subtitles.english: But why on earth, why, why? Why, why, are you angry?

subtitles.original: 不安定なカンテラ何処まで行くの
subtitles.english: How far will this unstable lantern go?

subtitles.original: あなた一切合切放り去ってもう
subtitles.english: You throw it all away and leave

subtitles.original: 冗談じゃあないわ トウキョウ・シャンディ・ランデヴ
subtitles.english: It's no joke! Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous

subtitles.original: その時が来たって如何にもならないぜ
subtitles.english: Even if that time comes, nothing can be done

subtitles.original: 曖昧な本当なんてメランコリ化するだけ
subtitles.english: Ambiguous truths just turn into melancholy

subtitles.original: あたしをさあ掻き攫って今テイクオンミー
subtitles.english: So, whisk me away, take on me now

subtitles.original: ちゃんちゃらおかしな法度ばっかで食指がびくともしないわ
subtitles.english: It's ridiculous, with all these taboos, my appetite won't be stirred

subtitles.original: 実態の無い感情放っておいたって
subtitles.english: Even if you leave those formless feelings alone

subtitles.original: 策略なんてありゃあせんのに何故
subtitles.english: Even though there are no strategies, why?

subtitles.original: ああもう懲り懲りよ あたしの喝となる気質も
subtitles.english: Ah, I'm already tired of it, my stimulating temperament

subtitles.original: じっと堪えて取り繕ってはとうとう臨界点
subtitles.english: Enduring and putting on a front, finally reaching the critical point

subtitles.original: 年がら年中リップサービス鈍感カマしては辟易
subtitles.english: Year-round giving lip service, playing dumb and getting fed up

subtitles.original: どんがらがっしゃんフィールガールは涙の目にも鬼
subtitles.english: The girl who is a 'feel girl' is a demon even in teary eyes

subtitles.original: 今や頭の中のミュージックのせいであなたの話は一向に聴き取れない
subtitles.english: Now, because of the music in my head, I can't hear your story at all

subtitles.original: 少しは真当なこと言って
subtitles.english: Say something sensible for once

subtitles.original: 回り出すターンテーブル ねえ全部忘れさせてよ
subtitles.english: Spinning turntable, hey, let me forget everything

subtitles.original: だけど一体全体如何して何故？ 如何して何故？ 何故何故怒ってんの？
subtitles.english: But why on earth, why, why? Why, why, are you angry?

subtitles.original: 不安定なカンテラ消えない儘ね
subtitles.english: An unstable lantern, it won't go out

subtitles.original: あなた一口両舌食い違ってもう
subtitles.english: You speak with a forked tongue, eating your words

subtitles.original: 冗談じゃあないわ トウキョウ・シャンディ・ランデヴ
subtitles.english: It's no joke! Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous

subtitles.original: その時が来たって如何にもならないぜ
subtitles.english: Even if that time comes, nothing can be done

subtitles.original: 曖昧な本当なんてメランコリ化するだけ
subtitles.english: Ambiguous truths just turn into melancholy

subtitles.original: あたしを今...
subtitles.english: Whisk me away...

subtitles.original: 冗談じゃあないわ トウキョウ・シャンディ・ランデヴ
subtitles.english: It's no joke! Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous

subtitles.original: その時が来たって如何にもならないぜ
subtitles.english: Even if that time comes, nothing can be done

subtitles.original: 不甲斐ないわ
subtitles.english: It's pathetic

subtitles.original: 感情なんてランドリーで落とすだけ
subtitles.english: I'll just wash away these feelings in the laundry

subtitles.original: あたしと確かめ合ってイエローマジック
subtitles.english: Verify it with me, yellow magic

subtitles.original: アイヤイヤ トウキョウ・シャンディ・ランデヴ
subtitles.english: Ai-ya-ya, Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous

subtitles.original: その時が来たって如何にもならないぜ
subtitles.english: Even if that time comes, nothing can be done

subtitles.original: 曖昧な本当なんてメランコリ化するだけ
subtitles.english: Ambiguous truths just turn into melancholy

subtitles.original: あたしをさあ掻き攫って今テイクオンミー
subtitles.english: So, whisk me away, take on me now

subtitles.original: AZKi 8th Birthday Live「Crossover」平成 vs 令和 アニソン歌合戦
subtitles.english: AZKi 8th Birthday Live 'Crossover' Heisei vs Reiwa Anisong Song Battle!

subtitles.original: 最後はチームみんなで歌い上げます
subtitles.english: At the end, everyone in the team will sing together!

subtitles.original: 平成赤チーム
subtitles.english: Heisei Red Team:

subtitles.original: アニメ「とある科学の超電磁砲」より、今も愛され続けるアニソンの王道、「only my railgun」
subtitles.english: From the anime 'A Certain Scientific Railgun', the classic anisong loved to this day, 'only my railgun'.

subtitles.original: 続いて令和青チーム
subtitles.english: Next up, Reiwa Blue Team:

subtitles.original: アニメ「呪術廻戦」より、鮮烈でエモーショナルな青春ソング、「青のすみか」
subtitles.english: From the anime 'Jujutsu Kaisen', the vivid and emotional youth song, 'Ao no Sumika'.

subtitles.original: ステージでぶつかる電撃と呪力。2曲続けてどうぞ！
subtitles.english: Electric shock and cursed energy clashing on stage. Please enjoy both songs in a row!

subtitles.original: 放て！心に刻んだ夢を 未来さえ置き去りにして
subtitles.english: Release! The dream carved into my heart, leaving even the future behind

subtitles.original: 限界など知らない 意味無い！
subtitles.english: I don't know any limits, it's meaningless!

subtitles.original: この能力(チカラ)が光散らす その先に遥かな想いを
subtitles.english: This power scatters light, with distant thoughts beyond that

subtitles.original: 歩いてきた この道を 振り返ることしか
subtitles.english: If I can only look back at this path I've walked...

subtitles.original: 出来ないなら... 今ここで全てを壊せる
subtitles.english: Then... I can destroy everything right here!

subtitles.original: 暗闇に堕ちる街並み 人はどこまで立ち向かえるの？
subtitles.english: In the streets falling into darkness, how far can people stand up?

subtitles.original: 加速するその痛みから 誰かをきっと守れるよ
subtitles.english: From that accelerating pain, I can surely protect someone!

subtitles.original: Looking! The blitz loop this planet to search way. Only my RAILGUN can shoot it. 今すぐ
subtitles.english: Looking! The blitz loop this planet to search way. Only my RAILGUN can shoot it. Right now,

subtitles.original: 身体中を光の速さで駆け巡った確かな予感
subtitles.english: A certain premonition ran through my body at the speed of light!
